falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the uncertainty of the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 14-day average on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal strong market conviction, disproving the 'UNKNOWN' phase by confirming a clear directional bias.

falsification_conditions.condition: A major central bank announces a rate cut of 50 basis points or more, followed by a 10% rally in the relevant index within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by demonstrating a clear policy-driven market move contrary to the pattern's implied expectation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
